message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "ユーザ" as User1
participant "ブラウザ" as Browser
database "web.php" as Web
database "Kouka2_1Controller" as Controller
database "Restdata" as RestData
boundary "index.blade.php" as IndexBlade
boundary "show.blade.php" as ShowBlade

User1 -> Browser: 該当ページをリクエスト[/kouka2_1]
Browser -> Web: GET[/kouka2_1]
Web -> Controller: @index
Controller -> RestData: all()
activate RestData
RestData --> Controller: 
deactivate RestData
Controller -> IndexBlade: 

User1 -> Browser: 検索ボタンを押下
Browser -> Web: GET[/kouka2_1/find]
Web -> Controller: @find
Controller -> RestData: where()->first()
activate RestData
RestData --> Controller: 
deactivate RestData
Controller -> ShowBlade: 

actor "ユーザ" as User2
participant "ブラウザ" as Browser2
database "web.php" as Web2
database "Kouka2_1Controller" as Controller2
database "Restdata" as RestData2
boundary "index.blade.php" as IndexBlade2
boundary "show.blade.php" as ShowBlade2

@enduml
```
